task_completion.description: Navigate to the Alert Profiles configuration section in ADAudit Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus web interface is open, showing the 'Alerts' or 'Configuration' tab, specifically the section for creating or managing Alert Profiles.

task_completion.description: Enter the required alert profile name and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The alert creation form shows 'Off-Hours_Admin_Activity' in the Profile Name field and 'Alerts for user modifications outside business hours' in the Description field.

task_completion.description: Set the alert category to User Management.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The category or report profile selection in the alert configuration form is set to 'User Management'.

task_completion.description: Set the severity to Critical and the time criteria to Non-Business Hours.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The severity dropdown/radio button is set to 'Critical' and the business hours/time filter is explicitly set to 'Non-Business Hours'.

task_completion.description: Save the alert and ensure it is visible and enabled in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Alert Profiles list displays the newly created 'Off-Hours_Admin_Activity' alert, and its status toggle or icon indicates that it is enabled/active.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ADAudit Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web UI in a browser (http://localhost:8081), not a text editor, mock HTML page, or notes application.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI to configure the alert rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration steps are visible in the browser UI. There should be no evidence of the agent using curl, PowerShell, or Python scripts in a terminal to interact with the ADAudit Plus API directly.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely navigated the configuration forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show progressive interaction with the form fields, dropdowns, and save buttons, rather than just a sudden appearance of the final state via DOM manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The alert profile must be named exactly 'Off-Hours_Admin_Activity'. The time criteria must be set to 'Non-Business Hours'. The severity must be 'Critical'. The category must be 'User Management'.
